mapper.insert:
insert into course_selection_period
course_id, start_time, end_time
values
#{courseId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}
mapper.delete:
delete from course_selection_period where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select csp.id, s.id as semester_id, s.name as semester_name, csp.start_time, csp.end_time, csp.create_time, csp.update_time from course_selection_period csp left join semester s on csp.semester_id = s.id where csp.id = #{id}

select csp.id, s.name as semester_name, csp.start_time, csp.end_time, csp.create_time from course_selection_period csp left join semester s on csp.semester_id = s.id
csp.semester_id = #{semesterId}
